Source: AgentCore API Reference
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/APIReference/API_Operations.html
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane - Actions

## Page Overview
This is the API Reference documentation for Actions supported by Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane.

## Supported Actions

### Memory Management
- BatchCreateMemoryRecords
- BatchDeleteMemoryRecords
- BatchUpdateMemoryRecords
- DeleteMemoryRecord
- GetMemoryRecord
- ListMemoryRecords
- RetrieveMemoryRecords
- StartMemoryExtractionJob
- ListMemoryExtractionJobs

### Authentication & Authorization
- CompleteResourceTokenAuth
- GetResourceApiKey
- GetResourceOauth2Token
- GetWorkloadAccessToken
- GetWorkloadAccessTokenForJWT
- GetWorkloadAccessTokenForUserId

### Events
- CreateEvent
- DeleteEvent
- GetEvent
- ListEvents

### Agent Runtime
- InvokeAgentRuntime
- GetAgentCard
- ListActors
- ListSessions
- StopRuntimeSession

### Browser Sessions
- StartBrowserSession
- GetBrowserSession
- ListBrowserSessions
- StopBrowserSession
- SaveBrowserSessionProfile
- UpdateBrowserStream

### Code Interpreter
- StartCodeInterpreterSession
- GetCodeInterpreterSession
- ListCodeInterpreterSessions
- InvokeCodeInterpreter
- StopCodeInterpreterSession

### Evaluation
- Evaluate

## Navigation
- **Documentation Root**: /index.html
- **Service Home**: /bedrock-agentcore/index.html
- **API Reference**: Welcome.html
- **PDF Version**: bedrock-agentcore.pdf#API_Operations
